brand_identity.name: Dwianto Capital Advisory
brand_identity.tone: Premium, Institutional, Trustworthy, Global, Understated Luxury
brand_identity.design_philosophy: European Private Equity Style (Lazard/Rothschild) - Minimalist, Text-Heavy, High-Contrast, Serene.

rules: Use 'tracking-tight' for all headings larger than 24px.

usage.background: White (#FFFFFF) or very light grey (#F8F9FA). Avoid pure black backgrounds unless for specific 'Dark Mode' sections.
usage.text: Dark Navy/Grey (#1A202C) for body. Deep Navy (#0A192F) for headings.
usage.accents: Muted Gold (#C5A059) for lines, active states, and subtle highlights. NEVER use bright yellow.
usage.gradients: FORBIDDEN. Use solid colors or subtle noise textures.

layout.grid_system: The 'Annual Report' Grid. 12 columns. High usage of whitespace.

containers.card_style: bg-white border border-border/60 p-8 hover:border-secondary/50 transition-colors duration-500 rounded-sm

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white rounded-sm px-8 py-4 text-sm uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-primary/90 transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-primary text-primary rounded-sm px-8 py-4 text-sm uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-primary hover:text-white transition-all

cards.service_card: group relative p-10 border-r border-b border-border/50 hover:bg-muted/30 transition-all duration-500
cards.feature_card: bg-white p-8 border border-border/40 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all

navigation.links: text-sm font-medium uppercase tracking-widest hover:text-secondary transition-colors

visual_enhancers.texture: Use a subtle noise texture overlay (opacity 0.03) on all solid backgrounds to prevent 'digital flatness'.
visual_enhancers.lines: Use 1px solid lines (color: border) to separate sections. Vertical lines in grids are encouraged.
visual_enhancers.images: Black and White or Desaturated photography with a slight warm tint. No stock-photo smiles.

hero_background.description: High-rise view of Jakarta skyline, muted tones, professional.

about_section.description: Business partners discussing agreement in modern office.

services_abstract.description: Twisted modern skyscraper architecture, abstract geometry.

legal_signing.description: Luxury fountain pen on notebook, close up.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add '@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Manrope:wght@300;400;500;600&family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,500;0,600;1,400&display=swap');' to index.css immediately.
2. CONFIGURE TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js to use the specific colors and fonts defined above. Map 'font-serif' to Playfair Display and 'font-sans' to Manrope.
3. BUILD LAYOUT: Use the 'Annual Report' grid. Avoid centering text unless it's a specific quote. Left-align most content.
4. USE SHADCN: Use Shadcn components for interactive elements (Accordion, Forms) but style them to match the 'Sharp & Flat' aesthetic (rounded-sm or rounded-none).
5. NO GRADIENTS: Do not use gradients. Use solid colors and 1px borders.
6. ANIMATIONS: Use 'framer-motion' for subtle fade-ins (y: 20 -> 0, opacity: 0 -> 1, duration: 0.8s). No bouncy animations.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add '.App { text-align: center; }' in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use 'sonner' for toasts. Sonner component are located in '/app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx'
